_comment: Topic queue for the automated blog. Generator pulls the next topic with status='pending'. Add new topics at any time. Set status='done' or 'skip' to skip. The generator never re-uses a 'done' topic.

topics.title: First Employee Or First VA? The Decision Framework Most Service Businesses Get Wrong
topics.intent: Founder considering first hire, debating in-house vs offshore VA. Educate on the tradeoffs, position Staffify as the modern answer.

topics.title: Why $1M Service Businesses Stall: The Operator Trap And How To Escape It
topics.intent: Owners stuck working in the business not on it. Frame the trap, give the exit path, position infrastructure (vs. just hiring) as the unlock.

topics.title: The Delegation Matrix: What Service Business Owners Should Keep, Outsource, And Automate
topics.intent: Practical framework, decision tool. Reader leaves with a checklist they can apply this week.

topics.title: Why Most SOPs Get Ignored And How To Build Ones Your Team Actually Follows
topics.intent: Owners who tried SOPs and saw no behavior change. Diagnose the failure modes, give the rebuild.

topics.title: The Hidden Cost Of Doing It Yourself: A Service Business Owner's Hour Audit
topics.intent: Get owners to calculate what their hour is actually worth and where it's leaking. Soft CTA to Staffify.

topics.title: When Offshore Talent Works And When It Doesn't: An Honest Read
topics.intent: Owners who burned out on bad VA experiences. Build trust by being candid about failure modes, then position infrastructure as the missing piece.

topics.title: The 11-Step Client Onboarding That Scales: A Service Business Playbook
topics.intent: Practical playbook. Reader leaves with a copyable framework. Demonstrates Staffify's operational depth.

topics.title: How To Run The COO Function Before You Can Afford A COO
topics.intent: $500K–$2M service businesses that need operational lift but can't afford a $180K hire. Position Staffify's infra layer.

topics.title: The Bottleneck Audit: Finding What's Actually Stopping Your Service Business From Growing
topics.intent: Diagnostic article. Step-by-step framework owners can run in 60 minutes.

topics.title: The Retention Multiplier: Why Keeping A Client Is 5x Cheaper Than Getting One
topics.intent: Reframe spend toward retention systems. Pair with case-study tone. Soft CTA to Exec Admin service.

topics.title: Pricing Power For Service Businesses: How To Stop Trading Hours For Dollars
topics.intent: Move owners off hourly billing. Tactical and philosophical. Demonstrates premium positioning Staffify embodies.

topics.title: Lead Gen vs Sales: Why Your Service Business Funnel Is Probably Breaking In One Of Three Places
topics.intent: Diagnose the funnel. Funnels into Auto Lead Gen service.

topics.title: From 'We Need Help' To First Day: The Service Business Hiring Funnel That Doesn't Collapse
topics.intent: Walk through the hiring funnel mistakes. Position Staffify's vetting-first model.

topics.title: When To Fire A Client (And How To Do It Without Burning The Relationship)
topics.intent: Mature operator article. Build credibility. Reader: owners with a few clients eating disproportionate time.

topics.title: The Minimum Viable Team Behind A 7-Figure Service Business
topics.intent: Reverse-engineer the team. Demystify. Position Staffify roles inside the structure.

topics.title: The Five KPIs That Actually Move Service Business Growth (And The Vanity Metrics You Can Ignore)
topics.intent: Sharp, practical. Reader leaves with a measurable scorecard.

topics.title: Specialists Or Generalists? How Service Businesses Should Staff Their First Five Roles
topics.intent: Structural advice on early hires. Useful for founders building their first team.

topics.title: Outsource Or Hire? A Decision Tree For Every Role In A Growing Service Business
topics.intent: Decision-tree article with concrete logic. Reader can copy/use.

topics.title: The 'Process Before People' Mistake: Why Hiring Without Systems Multiplies Your Chaos
topics.intent: Counter the 'just hire someone' instinct. Make the case for infrastructure first.

topics.title: Cash Flow Rules Every Service Business Owner Should Run On Autopilot
topics.intent: Tactical finance article. Build trust through specificity. Avoids being a Staffify pitch.
